text.message: Someone is one 4 with road contender
i mean you didnt rob them either blue
tbh i just wanted the wheat
You kept robbing me from the beginning. I rolled it once
i mean you took my only good expansion, what else am i gonna do blue, im gonna lose anyway
See what he replied. Robbing me only
its catan, was trying to defend my settle spot, not to mention your setup is really strong
its not like im robbing last
But oj on 7 i was on 3
where did i lose my points
Or you think im gonna take road?
oj wasnt fighting me for my only good expansion, what dont you understand about that blue
you cant argue you are on 3 and i am on 7 blue
you shouldve built to the 3:1, you got greedy
dang, id take that if i had it red
yea unfortunate to port the wheat there
after I 4 for 1d it the turn before also
if i knew you were trading wheat for wood
lol, if you played properly, you had a good chance blue, a great chance
Not gonna learn from a player who is far behind than me
clearly you dont do much learning at all
Blck you started targetting me from the beginning thats why the board becomes so imbalanced
my blocks were fair given the circiumstances
Still it is very fair rob
shame, i was rooting for you haha
think the game is a lot closer than you guys always pretend it to be
